idea-plugin.name: RemarkMD
idea-plugin.description:
Google-Docs-style commenting for Markdown, where the other reviewer is Claude. Open a .md file, select a passage in the rendered preview, and leave a comment. Comments are stored inside the file itself, as YAML front matter under an mdreview key, anchored to a [^cN] footnote marker in the prose. The file is both the database and the handoff protocol.

Bundled third-party components: Mermaid (diagram rendering, MIT license) and SnakeYAML (YAML parsing, Apache License 2.0). Full notices ship in the plugin and in the repository's THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md.

"Claude" is a trademark of Anthropic, PBC. This plugin is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic.

action.description: Copy the file's open review comments, with ids and instructions, to the clipboard for Claude.
